qa_pairs.question: Which beers named Side Kick Kölsch have the style Kölsch?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT beers.id FROM beers
WHERE beers.style = 'Kölsch' AND beers.name = 'Side Kick Kölsch'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which beers entities with style equal to 'Kölsch' and name equal to 'Side Kick Kölsch'?
